en: Get your grip on the sleeve and pass the guard.
Use the butterfly hook to sweep him.
Establish your underhook and frame on the hip.
From half guard, threaten the kimura to force the pass.
Control the ankle, then break the grip on your collar.
Pummel through to get the underhook and crossface.
Set up the heel hook from ashi garami.
Backstep into the leg drag and finish the pass.
Frame against the cross face to recover guard.
From de la Riva, hook the leg and start the berimbolo.
Drill the entry to x-guard from butterfly hook.
Stack pass when his knees are on your chest.
Sit through to north-south kimura.
From the back, attack with bow and arrow choke.
Post on his hip and shrimp out to recover.
Threaten the omoplata to force him to roll.
Use the lapel grip to set up the worm guard.
Hand fight to break the underhook battle.
Knee cut pass straight into mount.
Reset and try the toreando from standing.
